health_conditions: post-operative (tummy tuck with muscle repair and breast lift/breast augmentation)

benefits.description: Minimal swelling for tummy tuck; reduced inflammation from BPC and TB
Excellent results in inflammation/swelling reduction post-op

protocol_notes: Started KLOW on POD 1 (post-operative day 1) following cosmetic surgery (tummy tuck with muscle repair and bilateral breast lift/augmentation). Discontinued at POD 9 and planning to restart at 4 weeks post-op due to concerns about hypertrophic scar formation from early anti-inflammatory use. User is a nurse practitioner in unrelated surgical specialty. Mentioned consideration of 'Wolverine stack' as alternative. One small area on breast showing thickness and raised appearance; rest of incisions looking good for POD 9.
